title: ctenitis boholensis
intro: Ctenitis boholensis, also known as Bohol ctenitis or Bohol netveined fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ctenitis boholensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Ctenitis boholensis include teas and infusions made from its leaves, which are traditionally used in folk medicine in certain regions, particularly in the Philippines.
